tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Use of Let.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Let का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Let me tell you. Let him go. Let her speak. Let us try. Let them play.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Use of Let.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Let का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Let me think. Let him rest. Let me check this. Let her do her work. Let us start.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मत उसे जाने दो।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Let us try yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Use of Let.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Let का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Let them decide. Let me have some time. Let him come. Let us work together.
